title: Agent ID
description: Title slide — The Identity Layer for the Agentic Internet. Series A. 4,291 agents registered.

title: The Shift
description: The agentic internet is here. 10B+ agents by 2028, $2.9T economy.

title: The Problem
description: A rogue agent executes $2.3M in unauthorized transactions. No identity, no reputation, no accountability.

title: The Insight
description: Every internet era gets its identity primitive. DNS → OAuth → Agent ID.

title: Why Now
description: The window just opened. Agents went mainstream, enterprise deployments up 400%, EU AI Act mandates accountability.

title: The Product
description: Agent ID in one slide — identity, trust, marketplace, mail, billing.

title: How It Works
description: The agent lifecycle — Register → Verify → Build Trust → Transact.

title: Market Size
description: TAM $580B / SAM $72B / SOM $4.2B — the autonomous agent economy.

title: Business Model
description: Subscriptions + transaction fees. Revenue scales with agent adoption.

title: Go-to-Market
description: Developer wedge → marketplace flywheel → enterprise. From 4K agents to 2M.

title: Traction
description: 4,291 agents in 60 days. 47% MoM growth. 3 enterprise pilots. Revenue live.

title: Competitive Landscape
description: No competitor owns the full stack. Agent ID is the only unified layer with compounding network effects.

title: The Team
description: Founding team — identity, trust, and marketplace infrastructure veterans.

title: The Vision
description: Every agent gets an ID. 500M+ agents, $50T+ annual transactions. The BGP of the agentic internet.

title: The Ask
description: $100M Series A at $1B valuation. Milestones at 12, 24, and 36 months.
